profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Jantra Grupo Indonesia Tbk engages in providing car repairing and maintenance services in Indonesia. It is also involved in wholesale and retail trading of spare parts and accessories. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Jantra Grupo Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Tahta Kertajaya Indonesia.
